sectionDesc: As Lead — Social Sector Growth & Digital Programs, I built foundational tools, operationalised government partnerships, and drove measurable social impact on a national protocol.

initiatives.title: ONDC Academy
initiatives.description: Built from scratch — digital education platform for network participants. Secured NCVET Dual Awarding Body accreditation. Certification made mandatory for network participation.

initiatives.title: ONDC Sahayak
initiatives.description: WhatsApp chatbot providing scalable seller onboarding support. Autonomously resolved 85% of queries across a rapidly growing national user base.

initiatives.title: Seller QR Code
initiatives.description: Interoperable QR code enabling instant digital storefront discovery and catalogue access for MSMEs across the ONDC network.

initiatives.title: ONDC Saarthi
initiatives.description: v1.0 developer reference app (UI/UX design) that accelerated third-party integration and reduced network onboarding time for participants.

initiatives.title: Government Partnerships
initiatives.description: Operationalised partnerships with Ministry of Rural Development and Ministry of Textiles. Enabled first-ever digital sales for artisans and SHGs across 15+ state and central emporiums.

initiatives.title: AP Women's Day Campaign
initiatives.description: Facilitated a campaign generating 3 lakh orders worth ₹5.13 crore in one week for women entrepreneurs in Andhra Pradesh.

socialImpact.title: Social Impact & Seller Trust
socialImpact.description: Supported a Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation-funded initiative to enhance seller trust and verification. Increased adoption of verifiable credentials (GI Tag, Women-Owned, Organic) by 40%. Authored a Supply Playbook that reversed sector de-growth by improving catalogue quality and fulfilment rates for rural and first-time digital sellers. Scaled credentialed sellers from 104 to 497 within the tracked cohort, and expanded network-wide credentials from 6K to 11K sellers.
